title: Better Water Mesh
body: Smoother water meshes for your world!  This changes the process of creating vanilla SOLID water meshes to smooth, fluent meshes. ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a38b6518a94a431b5c4b06bb49ad8835e5c8b52f_0.webp)   #### Config: Currently not available. :P #### Notes: * This is a client-side mod. * Feel free to use this mod in any modpacks. #### Mod compatibilities: Unknown... #### Mod Incompatibilities: Probably a lot. XD
